allow: Bash(grep -vE "set-state-in-effect|setState synchronously|Effects are intended|Update external|Subscribe for|Calling setState|^\\s*\\*|react.dev|^\\s*$|^\\s*[0-9]+ \\|")

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, @{N='Cmd';E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 16628,14940,12180 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $still = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { "Remaining node PIDs: $\($still.Id -join ', '\)" } else { "All node processes stopped." })
